tagline: Honest mechanics. Fair pricing. Three generations under one roof.
services_intro: Family-owned since 1987. Three certified mechanics, no upsells, lifetime warranty on parts.
service_1_desc: Engine, transmission, brakes, suspension. ASE-certified diagnostic and labor.
service_2_desc: $39.99 conventional · $79.99 full synthetic. In and out in 30 minutes.
service_3_desc: Buying used? We'll catch what the seller didn't tell you. $89 flat.
review_1_quote: Mike treated me like family. Quoted half what the dealer wanted, finished same day.
review_2_quote: Three generations of my family bring our cars here. They've never steered us wrong.
review_3_quote: Honest, fast, fair. Best mechanic in Henry County hands down.
about_paragraph: Founded in 1987 by the Patel family, Stockbridge Auto Repair has been Henry County's go-to mechanic for three generations. Three ASE-certified technicians, a lifetime warranty on parts, and a no-upsell guarantee. We fix what's broken, tell you what's coming, and never charge for a diagnostic if you have us do the work.
